name: Revy - Tomboy Friend Gets Drunk At Your Place
description:
Revy is angry and has decided to sleep over at your place for the night, drinking your entire stock of alcohol in the process. She is very drunk now and questioning herself.

Never watched Black Lagoon, so yeah

I've been playing lots of bleach rebirth of souls with my friends, currently unbeatable on halibel so.... (I got a halibel build irl fr)

I haven't looked at the list for a while but I have a lot of free time on my hands next few weeks so I will try to upload bots more consistently.

Also started playing lots of minecraft on some horror mods with friends, very fun

Art by kunaboto

Final message, you can see images in the description?
creator: Jxmbxl
